codeReview.summary: Core endpoints and most required behaviors are implemented and well covered by tests, but there is a blocking edge-case bug in tag syncing that can cause article create/update to fail with a 500 when duplicate keywords are supplied in one request.

issues.description: `syncTags()` does not deduplicate parsed keywords before inserting into `article_tags`. With input like `keywords: "php, php"`, the loop attempts the same `(tagsTagId, tagsArticleId)` insert twice, violating the composite PK on `article_tags` (`app/apps/server/src/db/schema.ts:163`) and causing the request to fail instead of reusing tags as expected.

`syncCategories()` inserts category links without deduplicating IDs. Duplicate category IDs in the payload can violate the composite PK on `article2cat` (`app/apps/server/src/db/schema.ts:137`) and surface as a server error. UI likely sends unique IDs, so impact is lower, but API-level robustness is incomplete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature introduced `UPLOADS_DIR` override behavior for attachments, but this env var is not documented in shared environment knowledge.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Code uses `process.env.UPLOADS_DIR` in `app/apps/server/src/routes/articles.ts:11-13`; `.factory/library/environment.md` lists only `SESSION_SECRET` and `PORT`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `fullstack-worker` procedure is not well aligned for backend-only features; transcript shows implementation-first flow and no browser/manual validation steps despite skill prescribing tests-first red phase and agent-browser verification.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session `3a518208-2354-4111-930e-5fd05c29f28b` shows `Create routes/articles.ts` before `Create __tests__/articles.test.ts`, and no `agent-browser` tool usage.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit `add4670`, transcript skeleton, and skill guidance. Result is FAIL due to a blocking duplicate-keyword tag-sync bug that can trigger PK violations and 500s during article create/update.
